blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 7 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of location-specific availability.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of location-specific availability.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the availability of services at different locations. While the linked use case mentions the ability to transfer appointments between locations, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
